step_rationale: BCAA catabolism enzyme; cardioprotective via metabolic regulation, off-cascade systemic axis.
mechanism: Branched-chain amino-acid catabolism regulates cardioprotective metabolic remodelling via oxoeicosanoid-receptor signalling.

references.title: BCAA exaggerated acute and chronic ischemic heart disease through promotion of NLRP3 via Sirt1.
Oxoeicosanoid receptor inhibition alleviates acute myocardial infarction through activation of BCAT1.
